topic: Prioritisasi, urutan eksekusi & keputusan scope Slice 2 Hunian

faisal_gates.G1: BLOCKING formula v2.0 — di mana/bagaimana user atur bobot Kondisi & Owner? A(settings override default EQUAL)/B(default EQUAL fixed Slice2)/C(default RENDAH fixed). Rekom A atau B. NO DEFAULT.
faisal_gates.G2: BLOCKING deploy S2-2 — Faisal bersedia inform pilot user skor berubah 3D->5D saat Slice2 live? Rekom Ya. NO DEFAULT.

revisit_trigger: 0 survey_complete events dlm 3 sesi pilot -> emergency review (usul 2D DA jadi relevan dgn data)
intent: Tentukan urutan eksekusi optimal + tarik garis Slice 2 MVP tajam untuk pilot + putuskan 4 scope terbuka (survey form/deriveVerdict, Apt&Kost JSONB vs typed, biaya all-in numeric, POI Directions cost) + tandai risiko over-build.

T-001.verdict: MVP=S2-0+S2-2+S2-4; std-if-capacity=S2-1+S2-5; defer S2-3/6/7/8. Urutan: S2-0->S2-2->S2-4->S2-1->S2-5->S2-6->S2-7->S2-3->S2-8. deriveVerdict ikut 5D, bump scoring_version 2.0, weight Kondisi/Owner default rendah. Apt/Kost SKIP. Biaya all-in semi-terstruktur NON-scoring. POI skip straight-line.

T-002.verdict: Decision-shaping: S2-2/S2-5/S2-4. Theater untuk solo pilot: S2-1 foto/S2-3 timeline/S2-7 POI. Survey worth dibangun; dead-zone=logistik bukan form; form <90 detik di properti. KOREKSI urutan dimensi: Kondisi+Owner DULU (ghost, nilai compare tertinggi). deriveVerdict berubah TAPI eksplisit (silent merusak trust). Partial radar: dashed outline, EXCLUDE ghost dari total, callout. RISIKO TERBESAR: biaya parsial di Compare (all-in vs listing tak comparable -> bisa membalik keputusan) -> wajib label sumber harga. Apt/Kost contingent demand onboarding; Kost>Apartemen. Assumption: dead-zone mungkin krn user putuskan di LUAR Hunian tanpa log balik.

T-003.verdict: MVP=S2-0+S2-2+S2-5+S2-4 (foto survey dijahit ke S2-2 BUKAN foto-listing standalone=parity-trap). Survey=core moat irreplaceable 18-24bln. Biaya all-in=conviction trigger. Apt/Kost DEFER; Kost > Apartemen di Slice 3. 4 parity-trap risk.

T-004.verdict: Effort total 18-25 hari solo. Urutan S2-0(S 0.5h)->S2-2(L 4-5h KUNCI)->S2-4(S 1h)->S2-1(M)->S2-5(M). Scope: (a)survey=avg sederhana per kelompok 0-100, partial pakai renormalisasi Slice1, bump scoring_version 2.0, badge survey parsial; (b)Apt/Kost JSONB+Zod TANPA pg_jsonschema, reset type_specific_data saat ganti property_type; (c)biaya all-in=ADD COLUMN numeric additive, text asli disimpan, reversibility HIGH; (d)POI=Distance Matrix bukan Directions, lazy top-15, cache, ~$0.75/bln/100MAU. candidate_poi DDL BELUM ada di schema.sql. 10 jebakan: RLS-via-JOIN child tables data-leak, helper insertCandidateEvent, signed-url TTL, compare v1-vs-v2 badge, type_specific reset, race double-billing, re-survey overwrite->log events.

T-005.verdict: CABUT 2 (S2-4 negosiasi=norma budaya effort S; POI defer tetap benar walau $0.75). MODIFIKASI S2-3: defer UI tapi POPULATE events table sbg side-effect S2-2 (data pilot invaluable). 3 konflik utk SYN: (A) S2-5 show-vs-score -> usul show-never-score; (B) survey 2D-dulu vs 6D-langsung -> usul build 2D (Kondisi+Owner) validate 1 minggu lalu expand; (C) scoring_version migration -> one-shot rescore semua kandidat existing (pilot kecil personally-known) BUKAN lazy+badge. 4 GATE FAISAL: G1 survey 2D vs 6D; G2 biaya all-in score vs display-only; G3 migration one-shot vs lazy; G4 biaya schema JSONB vs fixed-columns. DA default: 2D / display-only / one-shot / minta TL justifikasi fixed-columns.

T-006.verdict: RESOLUSI: A=display-only (tdk masuk scoring); B=6D LANGSUNG (non-adopsi=behavior bukan form-length; 2D malah 2x migration; events side-effect beri detection window 3 sesi); C=ONE-SHOT migration (Compare hero; 3D+5D dlm 1 view=functional failure; <20 kandidat trivial; script=deliverable S2-2). MVP=S2-0+S2-2+S2-4+S2-5(display)+events-side-effect. Tier2=foto survey dijahit S2-2. Defer S2-3UI/S2-6/S2-7/S2-8. 4 gate DA SEMUA ditutup developer-default. 2 GATE FAISAL BARU: F1=weight Kondisi+Owner EQUAL vs RENDAH (rekom EQUAL, default diam=EQUAL); F2=sign-off awareness one-shot migration (MUST-ACT, no default, TL tdk deploy sampai confirm). REVISIT TRIGGER: 0 survey_complete dlm 3 sesi->emergency review. Confidence MEDIUM (behavioral bet on-location belum teruji).

T-007.verdict: PENDING CONFIRMATION. Vision check: 5D/one-shot/deriveVerdict AMAN selama framing trade-off; biaya display-only AMAN. KONFLIK VISION: F1 hanya pilih antar default sistem -> langgar 'bobot SELALU=pilihan user' utk 2 dimensi baru. 2 gate Faisal final (G1 bobot, G2 sign-off migrasi), NO DEFAULT keduanya. 4 gate DA & 11 hal lain = developer-default, tak perlu ditanya Faisal.

note: Wave 1 paralel. Setelah keempat selesai -> DA challenge -> SYN -> PO gate. Subagent diinstruksikan menulis output penuh ke agent-memory (anti-truncation notifikasi).
